prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次分别为约 158→112→116→→8682，2025 年因新增护理学（再选生物）专业组，校最低位次从百名级别大幅后移至 8682 名，基准位次约 8682 名；2021–2023 年理科计划均为 3 人，2025 年物理类计划增至 8 人（含临床医学 2 人、护理学 6 人）；2026 年物理类计划大幅扩至 18 人，新增药学、预防医学、口腔医学、基础医学等专业，扩招幅度达 125%，竞争压力显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含医学院）为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名主榜第 5 名（2026 年），属全国顶尖层次；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理事件；抖音热度排名第 4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续升温；2021–2025 年未见明显投档断档记录；依托复旦大学学科体系，临床医学 A、公共卫生与预防医学 A+、护理学 A-、药学 A、基础医学（依托复旦生物学 A+），医学学科实力居全国前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学持续高热推荐，口腔医学推荐，护理学推荐；药学、预防医学等专业热度平稳；本省 2026 年考生总数约 47.49 万，较 2025 年略有增加（物理类估算约 26.78 万），竞争基数小幅上升；省控线数据已纳入参考；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海，属一线城市，对江西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8682 名、2026 年物理类招生计划从 8 人扩至 18 人（扩招 125%）这一最大利空因素、本省考生小幅增加、学校顶尖层次与医学专业高热度的支撑，预计 2026 年校最低位次将大幅后移至约 15394 名，区间 14894–15894 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）
- 口腔医学（卓越口腔医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学（拔尖班/产教融合班）
- 基础医学（尚医拔尖班）
- 预防医学（拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（卓越班/含护理学-人工智能双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年物理类大幅扩招，位次预计显著后移，建议位次在 15000 名以内的考生以二档专业为主、一档冲刺；位次在 15500 名附近可重点考虑三档护理学保底，同时争取二档专业；位次明显优于 14894 名可大胆冲刺一档临床医学与口腔医学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 158→112→116→→8682. In 2025, due to the addition of the Nursing (with Biology as a prerequisite) major group, the minimum ranking dropped significantly from the hundred-level to 8682, with a baseline ranking of about 8682. From 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 3 students; in 2025, the Physics Category plan increased to 8 students (including 2 for Clinical Medicine and 6 for Nursing). In 2026, the Physics Category plan expanded significantly to 18 students, adding majors such as Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, Stomatology, and Basic Medicine, with an expansion rate of 125%, significantly intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including its Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings (2026), placing it at the national top level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents. It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention for applications. From 2021 to 2025, there were no obvious records of admission gaps. Relying on Fudan University's discipline system, Clinical Medicine is rated A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, and Basic Medicine (relying on Fudan's Biology A+), placing the medical discipline strength among the top in the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine continues to be highly recommended, Stomatology is recommended, and Nursing is recommended. Majors like Pharmacy and Preventive Medicine have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (estimated Physics Category about 267,800), with a small rise in the competition base. Provincial control score data has been included for reference. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 8682 in 2025, the major negative factor of the Physics Category enrollment plan expanding from 8 to 18 students (a 125% increase) in 2026, a slight increase in the number of examinees in the province, and the support from the school's top-tier level and high popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the school in 2026 will significantly drop to about 15,394, with a range of 14,894 to 15,894.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Stomatology (Excellent Stomatologist Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Pharmacy (Top Talent Class/Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Basic Medicine (Shangyi Top Talent Class)
- Preventive Medicine (Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (Excellent Class/Including Nursing-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant enrollment expansion, with rankings expected to drop notably. It is recommended that examinees with rankings within 15,000 focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch. Those with rankings around 15,500 can consider Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option while striving for Tier 2 majors. Examinees with rankings significantly better than 14,894 can boldly aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine and Stomatology.

一档（最难进）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2894→2175→2314→→3009, with recent fluctuations between 2175 and 3009, and a 2025 baseline of about 3009; from 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts plan was 10 students each year, but in 2025 the history category plan was reduced to 4 students; in 2026, the history category plan remains at 4 students, with a stable number of places and a basically stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including its medical college) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings (2026), belonging to the top tier nationally; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents; it ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high application attention; from 2021 to 2025, there were no obvious records of enrollment gaps; the history category only admits the Nursing major, relying on Fudan University's Nursing A- discipline, with strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Nursing major has a recommended social popularity, with a talent shortage and good employment prospects; in 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is about 474,900, with the history category estimated at about 207,100, a slight increase from 206,100 in 2025, leading to a slightly higher competitive base; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city that has strong appeal to Jiangxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3009, the unchanged history category plan for 2026, a slight increase in provincial examinees, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the university in 2026 will slightly shift backward to about 3039, with a range of 2674 to 3404.
